title: The Shandia Join the Battle
description: Enel’s priests and the Shandia warriors clash as the Straw Hats are drawn into the hidden war over Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Luffy, Usopp. Enel’s priests and the Shandia warriors clash as the Straw Hats are drawn into the hidden war over Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Don't panic. Take it nice and slow!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Now... where are the other two...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey!! Do you see it, usopp!?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: What!? Then what is Luffy doing?

summary: Enel’s priests and the Shandia warriors clash as the Straw Hats are drawn into the hidden war over Upper Yard.
